name: Word Impostor
summary: Everyone gets a secret word, but one person has to improvise. Give smart clues, find the impostor, and do not reveal the answer.
objective: The group tries to identify who received different information. The impostor tries to blend in and can still steal the win by discovering the word.

flow.reveal: Pass the phone so each player can reveal their information privately.
flow.talk: In the chosen order, everyone gives a clue or answers the displayed question.
flow.accuse: The group discusses and chooses one suspect.
flow.score: The impostor scores by escaping or guessing the word; the group scores by stopping both.

no-word.name: No word
no-word.description: The impostor knows their role but must bluff without a word.

hint.name: With a hint
hint.description: The impostor knows their role and receives a related hint.

alternate-word.name: Different word
alternate-word.description: The impostor receives another word and does not know their role is different.

one-word.name: One word
one-word.description: Each player says one related word.

guided-questions.name: Guided questions
guided-questions.description: The app gives each player a question to answer.

rules: Each participant will be the impostor exactly once during the game.
Do not say the secret word or give an overly obvious clue.
After the clues, the group chooses one accused player together.
If discovered, the impostor can still try to guess the word.

setup.title: Set up game
setup.emptyGroup: Your group is empty. You can add guests below.
setup.rounds: The game will have {{count}} rounds: everyone will be the impostor once.

play.private: Only {{name}} should look at the screen.
play.noWord: You did not receive a word. Watch the clues and improvise.
play.alternateNotice: Memorize your word and do not let anyone see it.
play.conversationIntro: The clue round starts now. The app will guide the order.
play.sayOneWord: Say one related word without revealing the secret answer.
play.discussionText: Review the answers and clues. When everyone agrees, record the accusation.
play.accusationText: Choose the group's final decision. It cannot be changed.
play.finalGuessText: {{name}} must say the secret word out loud. Do not show the answer yet.

result.title: Game over
result.description: The highest score after the full group cycle wins.
